name: limit-guard
description: PostToolUse(Task) hook — detects a session/usage-limit signal in a subagent result and (0.1.4) AUTO-SNAPSHOTS uncommitted work non-destructively (`git diff HEAD` → `.claude/limit-snapshots/<ts>.patch` + status sidecar; NO commit/push/stash/index mutation — shared-worktree safe; recover via `git apply`), then injects a non-blocking checkpoint directive: report progress (committed SHAs vs uncommitted), commit + push uncommitted work, write a `.claude/RESUME.md` resume manifest (done · remaining · reset time · next step), stop parallel fan-out and switch to sequential commit-per-unit work. Implemented in hexa-lang (`_limit_guard.hexa` via `hexa run` — no Python, no shell shim). NO opt-out by design — no env var, no config file, no exception list.
